asins.title: ASINs
asins.description: List of Amazon product ASINs to scrape reviews for (e.g. B0GDHXBK25).

countries.title: Marketplaces
countries.description: Amazon marketplaces to scrape. Accepts 2-letter country codes (US, DE, FR, ES, IT, UK, JP, IN).

starFilters.title: Star Rating Filters
starFilters.description: Which star rating buckets to scrape. Select all five for complete coverage, or limit to 1–3 for critical review monitoring.

maxPages.title: Max Pages per Filter
maxPages.description: Number of review pages to fetch per ASIN / marketplace / star-filter combination. Each page contains up to 10 reviews. Default: 1 (≈10 recent reviews per combo).

maxBudgetUsd.title: Max Budget (USD)
maxBudgetUsd.description: Optional hard cap on Axesso API costs per run (e.g. 10 = stop after $10 of Axesso charges). Leave blank for no cap.

filterMode.title: Filter Mode
filterMode.description: How to filter Axesso output before returning results. Strict (recommended): keep only rows with statusCode=200 and statusMessage=FOUND. Lenient: only strip NO_REVIEWS_PENALTY placeholder rows.
